name: com.suvitruf.box3d
description: Unity bindings for Box3d, Erin Catto's 3D physics engine. Full C API coverage via P/Invoke: rigid bodies, six shape types, nine joint types, queries, contact/sensor events, a character mover toolkit and debug drawing — with deterministic simulation and strong multithreaded performance.

samples.description: Spheres raining onto a ground hull: world creation, stepping, transform sync via body move events.
A swinging chain of spherical joints with a ball on a distance-joint rope. Includes a debug-draw toggle.
Click-drag bodies with a motor joint (box3d's mouse joint). Requires the Input System package.
Kinematic capsule character (WASD + jump) built on the collide/solve/clip mover toolkit. Requires the Input System package.
Drivable car on wheel joints over mesh terrain, ported from box3d's Driving sample. Requires the Input System package.
Side-by-side performance scenes (sphere rain, joint-grid cloth, island workloads) comparing Box3d and Unity's built-in PhysX, with CSV metric export.

Interactive sandbox: spawn textured objects from a menu, drag/throw with the mouse, right-click explosions, a seesaw, a conveyor belt, impact flashes and a live step-time readout. Requires the Input System package.
